{{Quote|The transition to AAB is all about moving forward with technology. USI has served well, but its time has passed. AAB more than triples the data-flow which will allow advancements in sensory input, perhaps allowing advanced tactile functionality for droids and prosthetics in the near future.|Illia Setag|<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|56|business/13516_2.html|Cybot Galactica Tries Proprietary Limbs}}</ref>}}
'''Illia Setag''' was the [[Chairman/Legends|Chairman]] of [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], at a time when Galactica was moving from the [[Universal Socket Interface]] to their own proprietary [[Advanced Appendage Bus/Legends|Advanced Appendage Bus]].

==Behind the scenes==
"Illia" is William with the first and last letters removed, and Setag is "Gates" spelled backwards, an oblique reference to [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bill_Gates Bill Gates], chairman and former CEO of Microsoft.

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|56|business/13516_2.html|Cybot Galactica Tries Proprietary Limbs}} {{1st}}
